title: LibraryAnalyticsUsagesByComponent
description: Library analytics usage data broken down by component.

componentKey.description: Unique, stable id of the component.

componentSetKey.description: Unique, stable id of the component set that this component belongs to.

componentSetName.description: Name of the component set that this component belongs to.

numInstances.description: The number of instances of the component within the organization.

numTeamsUsing.description: The number of teams using the component within the organization.

numFilesUsing.description: The number of files using the component within the organization.
